stemHtml: You hear an urgency message on the distress frequency and no other station responds. Among other actions, you must...

options.a: Retransmit it on the distress frequency.
options.b: Acknowledge the message, then immediately relay it to the appropriate ATS unit.
options.c: Retransmit the urgency message on the frequency you were using.
options.d: Acknowledge and await instructions from ATS.
